title: Jabiimi
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Jabiimi.jpg|thumb|Enslaved Jabiimi]]
'''Jabiimi''', also known as '''Jabiimite''', were [[Human/Legends|Humans]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]]. They settled on the world around [[3000 BBY]]. The fact that they were widely ignored by the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] community, even during times of crisis, left them with a distrust of whichever government was in power. This distrust led to an open rebellion when the [[Jabiimi Loyalists]] aided the Republic forces and let them land on Jabiim. Then the [[Jabiimi Nationalists]] chose to aid the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy]] in what would be known as the conquest of Jabiim.

{{Species-stub}}
